title: Shirahane Vehicle [MTR4]
description: Several original MTR4 vehicles packed in a resource pack.
body:
# [MTR 4.0] Shirahane Vehicle _**"A limitation on size frees more imagination"**_
This resource pack features original vehicles, including trains, trams, and buses, in fine detail and an elaborate semi-realistic style.
Most models are inspired by real-world vehicles but include modifications to suit lower passenger counts in smaller servers.
If you prefer small vehicles for compact, dedicated towns and stations, these may be your choice.
These vehicles were originally commissioned for a server that closed long ago. As the copyright term has expired, I am sharing my work with all of you.
## Attractive Features ⭐ Every car is unique, with different car numbers and hull text.
⭐ Finely detailed models in a semi-realistic style. Bogies, under-floor equipment, and interior decorations are all modeled in detail.
⭐ Customization-friendly textures: car numbers, destination screens, logos, vehicle text, and ads are easy to edit and swap.
⭐ Door-closing indication lights, as well as head and rear lights, function realistically.
⭐ Bogies with animations.
⭐ Destination and train-type screens with animations.
⭐ Retro tram with functional pantographs.
⭐ Wheel heights precisely adjusted to fit default 3D rails.
⭐ 1435mm and 1067mm railways with pixel-art style gravel bases.
[Planned] Detailed driver's cab.
[Planned] Sound effects for DMU engines, ATS alarms, and in-car/station broadcasts.
[Planned] Textures with hand-drawn shading and metallic PBR effects.
[Planned] JS-controlled interior lighting that activates automatically in the dark.
[Planned] In-game customizable car numbers.
[Planned] Functional seats.
## Contents Vehicles in this pack are all with unique numbers. Setting "unlimited vehicles" in depot GUI is not recommended.
**420 Series DMU**
The ShirahaneVehicle D1000 series is a small-size DMU that operates in 2-car formations.
Length: 16m
Width: 2.8m
Gauge: 1435mm
Platform Height: 1250mm
6 formations for the Latitude Line in the standard livery:
[42001-42102] Huadu, Youqing Depot
[42003-42104] Huadu, Youqing Depot
[42005-42106] Huadu, Youqing Depot
[42007-42108] Huadu, Youqing Depot
[42013-42114] Huadu, Xinsheng Depot
[42015-42116] Huadu, Xinsheng Depot
2 formations for Timothy North Railways in Fengxun Livery and Timothy-style interior design:
[42001-42102] Fengxun, Qingmei Depot
[42003-42104] Fengxun, Qingmei Depot
**SHB-1000 Railway Auxiliary Buses**
4 buses for the Railway Substitution Line:
[SHB-1001] Mingsha Central Bus Depot
[SHB-1002] Mingsha Central Bus Depot
[SHB-1003] Mingsha Central Bus Depot
[SHB-1004] Mingsha Central Bus Depot
**330 Series Retro Tram for Kaliope Transport Bureau**
1 test tram
## Additional Message ### Special thanks to All my friends for their consideration and patience.
@huliawsl for his CG knowledge and encouragement.
@Santorsia for his guidance on copyright awareness and the unforgettable days spent on his server.
**Santorsia has retired from the internet, so please do not disturb Santorsia. Huli is also busy with personal life.** **"To witness time and devotion"**
**"见证时间与热爱❤"**
**"見證時間與熱愛❤"**
**"時間と情熱を証しに❤"**
CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0
by ShirahaneExpress
May 15, 2026
